evidence: We have made and continue to make significant investments in customer facing technology such as delta.com, the Delta app… new AI-based tools and services, and related initiatives

we are beginning to adopt artificial intelligence models to help us route and distribute bags… and make gating decisions… also using AI to optimize the frequency and timing of maintenance tasks
we are beginning to adopt artificial intelligence models to help us route and distribute bags with short timeframes to make connections in our hubs and make gating decisions
we launched the beta version of Delta Concierge, an AI-powered virtual assistant within the Delta app, which aims to deliver real-time travel support
We are also using AI to optimize the frequency and timing of maintenance tasks to increase reliability
Threat actors are also increasingly leveraging advanced technologies, including the use of AI and automated tools, to enhance the scale, speed and effectiveness of cyberattacks

emerging laws and regulations governing the use of AI… may pose material risks to our business, including increased operational burdens and costs, regulatory enforcement, and legal claims
